name: WeChatPadPro
description: OpenClaw channel plugin for WeChatPadPro / WeChatPadProMax

wechatpadpro.label: WeChatPadPro
wechatpadpro.description: Connect OpenClaw to WeChat via WeChatPadPro / WeChatPadProMax (iPad protocol).

adminKey.description: WeChatPadPro admin key (required for WS mode only)

authKey.description: Pre-generated auth key for standard WCPP (optional, auto-generated if omitted)

authcode.description: WeChatPadProMAX authcode (required for sync / websocket / webhook modes)

wxid.description: WeChat ID (optional; auto-detected from Newinit response)

syncMode.description: Message sync mode. Auto-detected from authcode if not set.

syncInterval.description: Poll interval in ms (sync mode only)

wsUrl.description: Custom WebSocket URL for websocket mode (auto-constructed from host when empty)

wsFallbackThreshold.description: Consecutive WebSocket failures before falling back to HTTP polling

webhookUrl.description: URL WCPP MAX will POST messages to (required for webhook mode)

webhookHost.description: Bind address for the local webhook HTTP server (default 127.0.0.1; set to 0.0.0.0 to expose directly without a reverse proxy)

webhookPort.description: Local HTTP server port for receiving webhook pushes

webhookSecret.description: HMAC-SHA256 secret for webhook signature verification (recommended)

newinitOnStart.description: Call Newinit on startup to establish longlink (required for WCPP MAX 0412+)

readOnly.description: Receive-only mode — blocks all outbound sends for account safety

maxMessageAge.description: Drop messages older than this many seconds (avoids replaying stale history)

allowFrom.description: List of wxid allowed to DM the bot (used when dmSecurity = allowlist)

passRevokemsg.description: Pass through message recall notifications (MsgType 10002 revokemsg)

replyWithMention.description: In group chats, prefix replies with @sender mention

proxy.description: Proxy URL for outbound HTTP/WS (e.g. socks5://user:pass@host:port)

adminKey.label: Admin Key
adminKey.help: Required only for WS mode (standard WCPP)

authKey.label: Auth Key
authKey.help: Pre-generated auth key (optional; auto-generated from adminKey if omitted)

authcode.label: Authcode
authcode.help: Required for sync / websocket / webhook modes (WCPP MAX)

wxid.label: WeChat ID
wxid.help: Auto-detected from Newinit response when left empty

syncMode.label: Sync Mode
syncMode.help: ws = WebSocket (standard WCPP) · sync = HTTP polling · websocket = WS push (MAX) · webhook = HTTP push (MAX)

wsUrl.label: WebSocket URL
wsUrl.help: Optional override; auto-constructed from host when empty

wsFallbackThreshold.label: WS Fallback Threshold
wsFallbackThreshold.help: Consecutive WS failures before falling back to HTTP polling

webhookUrl.label: Webhook URL
webhookUrl.help: URL WCPP MAX will POST to (required for webhook mode)

webhookHost.label: Webhook Bind Address
webhookHost.help: Default 127.0.0.1 (loopback, behind reverse proxy). Set 0.0.0.0 to expose the webhook server directly on all interfaces.

webhookSecret.label: Webhook Secret
webhookSecret.help: HMAC-SHA256 shared secret for signature verification

newinitOnStart.label: Newinit on Start
newinitOnStart.help: Activates the longlink dispatch pipeline; required for WCPP MAX 0412+

readOnly.label: Read-Only Mode
readOnly.help: Receive only; blocks all outbound sends (account safety)

maxMessageAge.label: Max Message Age (s)
maxMessageAge.help: Drop messages older than this to avoid replaying stale history on reconnect

allowFrom.label: DM Allowlist
allowFrom.help: wxids permitted to DM the bot (used when dmSecurity = allowlist)

replyWithMention.label: Reply With @Mention
replyWithMention.help: In group chats, prefix replies with @sender
